_note: Reviewer follow-up #8: pre-fix `<svelte:boundary>`'s `{#snippet failed(err)}` body emitted via the regular snippet path produced `void ((err: any) => {…})` — disconnected from the boundary's declared prop signature in `svelte/elements.d.ts` (`failed?: Snippet<[error: unknown, reset: () => void]>`). Result: `err` typed as `any` and any handling of it passed silently. Post-fix the snippet emits as `failed: (err) => { body; return __svn_snippet_return(); }` INSIDE the createElement attrs object, so contextual typing flows the Snippet's tuple shape into the arrow params: `err` types as `unknown`. The wrong-shape `takesString(err)` call (declared `(s: string)`) then fails TS2345 (`Argument of type 'unknown' is not assignable to parameter of type 'string'`) at the source `err` argument position. Mirrors upstream svelte2tsx's `svelte-boundary.v5/expectedv2.js` shape.
